_note: Static disclosure content bundle for the portal's Provenance/Methods/About page and Footer. Grounded in repo docs (docs/provenance_registry.csv, docs/technical_methods.md, docs/data_dictionary.md, docs/concept_dictionary.md). Dynamic build fields (data_version, generated_at) should be merged from real-dataset.json (sourceVersion/generatedAt) at render time. See docs/frontend_disclosure_spec.md.

coverage.note: genome_total_targets = 11,526 measured targets, a subset of the 12,748-gene library (genome_library_size = the union of all expressed genes + all TFs). de_rows_total = 33,983 is one row per target x condition (11,086 targets measured in all 3 conditions, 285 in 2, 155 in 1); it is not 11,526 x 3. Every measured target carries real statistics + a real readiness call. Deeper external evidence (drugs / disease associations / clinical trials / constraint) is populated only for the genes the cache covers; every other field shows 'unknown' + a coverage note, never a fabricated zero.

paper_reference._note: Authoritative reference figures from the source paper, shown alongside platform coverage numbers.
paper_reference.trans_effect_significance: FDR<10%, >=3 downstream DE genes, in >=1 condition
paper_reference.summary: Per the paper, 7,807 (67%) of perturbed genes had significant trans-effects (FDR<10%, >=3 DE genes, in >=1 condition), with a mean of 81.61 downstream DE genes per perturbation.

disclaimer.short: Research use only — not clinical software.
disclaimer.long: This tool outputs research-use target prioritisation only. It does not diagnose, does not recommend treatment, and must not be used for patient management. CRISPRi ≠ pharmacology: a strong signal in the in vitro CD4 T-cell context is a research lead, not a guarantee of efficacy or safety; safety and druggability must be interpreted back against human evidence.

principles.text: Any evidence domain with no data shows an explicit 'unknown' + a coverage note; it is never filled with 0 or a default value.
No matter how strong the downstream statistics, hitting essential / broad-effect / off-target / knockdown-unconfirmed / batch-confounded / direction-ambiguous caps the decision.
The in vitro CD4 context caveat is always shown; a strong in vitro signal does not equal clinical efficacy.
The concept layer (M01–M20), mechanism figures, and safety overlays are descriptive and never enter the readiness decision.
User-uploaded datasets are isolated under the usr_ namespace and never mixed into the GWT reference set.
Every dataset carries four version layers (engine / dataset / schema / kd_threshold); provenance is a field, not a footnote.

limitations: Known technical debt on the upload path: kd_status for upload-only data and the n_total_de_genes mapping are missing (Tech-Debt A.1 / A.2).
Condition specificity (condition_specificity_score) is a heuristic, not a statistical interaction test.
Signed module scoring was abandoned (DE has no per-gene direction); SCEPTRE uses an external hook and Mixscape is substituted with scikit-learn (intentional).
Cell-level real data was not run (~1.7 TiB); validation was against synthetic fixtures only.
Deep external evidence exists for only 21 genes; the rest is left blank (not 0).
The platform has no access control; the usr_ naming only prevents accidental mixing, not authorised isolation.

validation.summary: Computational levels L1–L4 substantially met and calibration passed; the fundamental gap is L5 wet-lab (never done). The evidence supports 'ranking which targets go into wet-lab experiments', but is not sufficient to claim causality / therapeutic effect.

ladder.label: Computationally reproducible
ladder.evidence: golden-file + known-answer pinned across 33,983 rows; 34 test files; four-layer version stamps

ladder.label: Statistically robust
ladder.evidence: Ranking stable, Spearman r=0.943 (honestly disclosing that the naive top-50 overlaps only 13/50)

ladder.label: Internally direction-consistent
ladder.evidence: All 8 TCR-proximal positive controls in Stim8hr fall in the top decile

ladder.label: Orthogonal computational validation
ladder.evidence: TYK2 rank 11 = deucravacitinib target; VAV1 62% / CD3E 58% STRING network reconstruction. Corroborative, not confirmatory (association ≠ causation, GSE318876 phenotype mismatch, n=55). The phenotype-matched activation screen (Track D) ran as null (see below)

ladder.label: Prospective wet-lab validation
ladder.evidence: No prospective wet-lab data at all — the only fundamental gap

track_d_phenotype_matched.summary: After running the phenotype-matched activation screens (Schmidt 2022 CD4⁺ IL2 / CD8⁺ IFNG, Freimer 2022), the directional ranking did not meet the pre-registered acceptance (AUROC 0.41–0.48, all <0.5). Honestly recorded as negative evidence; L4 is not upgraded.
track_d_phenotype_matched.interpretation: The null is explainable: (1) primary_rank ranks transcriptional directionality, not activation-hit strength (a different axis); (2) 31/50 of the screen's top-50 hits are essential-gene viability dropouts and simply are not in our ranking. Switching to footprint breadth (magnitude) gives a weak but highly significant positive correlation (Spearman ρ +0.11~+0.28, p≤7e-34).

secondary_magnitude_axis.summary: Fair version (secondary, exploratory): using footprint breadth n_hits as the score (= the axis used for the AUROC 0.85 calibration) and excluding Hart essentials, AUROC passes. That is, the platform's footprint-strength signal does align with independent activation screens; what does not align is the directional re-ranking.
secondary_magnitude_axis.caveat: Exploratory (the axis was chosen after seeing the null), and with an un-removed confound: both 'our footprint is large' and 'their screen is significant' rise with expression / statistical power, so part of the 0.74–0.79 may be shared detectability rather than shared biology. Corroborative-with-confound, not a clean win; L4 is still not upgraded to met.

track_d_phenotype_matched.shifrut_note: Shifrut 2018 was not cached and NCBI/Cell are blocked by the sandbox network policy, so it could not be run here; the harness stays turn-key for it.

l4_limitations: Association ≠ causation (Track A GWAS / Open Targets)
Phenotype mismatch: the only genome-wide CD4 CRISPR screen, GSE318876, measures HIV infection, not T-cell activation
Small n and literature bias: 55 validation targets; STRING recovery is subject to research-attention bias

The phenotype-matched activation screen (Track D, Schmidt/Freimer) ran as null: directional ranking AUROC <0.5, below the 0.65 acceptance; mainly due to axis difference + essential-gene dropout, with a weak positive magnitude consistency

attribution.license: Per the paper / CZI Virtual Cells Platform terms

attribution.cite: Ochoa et al. 2024, Nucleic Acids Res (PMID 39657122)

concept_layer.invariant: The concept activation score is descriptive and never feeds readiness_call / _stage().
